title: heptapleurum rugosum
intro: Heptapleurum rugosum, also known as the Himalayan maidenhair fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Araliaceae. This plant is native to the Himalayas and is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Heptapleurum rugosum include reducing fever and inflammation, as well as treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Heptapleurum rugosum can be prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, or infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine as a powder or dried extract.
